scope: Army Camp staff/division command recommendations using active staff intelligence directive context
mobileQa: skipped: mobile is no longer a current target

steps: Reload local app and enter the camp from the strategic map.
Open Doctrine and select 敵情分析 as the turn staff directive.
Open Army Camp and inspect 参謀部推奨.
Verify recommendation context includes the active directive and the directive explanation line.
Switch Doctrine directive to 工兵測量.
Return to Army Camp and verify the recommendation context updates to the new directive.

armyRecommendation: 参謀任務補正: 敵情分析
戦場補正: 東方辺境防衛線 / 塹壕 / 敵圧42 / 危険78% / 主敵群集+銃兵+突破体 / 参謀任務敵情分析
参謀任務補正: 工兵測量
